resources.string: Setting up a mod
Just walk through the steps below — about a minute, tops.
Back
Screenshot for step %1$d
And that\'s it — enjoy!
Choose a mod you like
Open the catalog and tap the mod you want to set up to open its page.
Tap "Download"
On the mod page tap the blue Download button at the bottom of the screen.
Let the download finish
The file gets saved to your device. Usually it only takes a few seconds.
Tap the green "Install" button
Once the file has downloaded, tap the green Install button next to it.
Pick Minecraft in the app picker
Android will ask which app should open the file — choose Minecraft from the list.
Minecraft opens on its own
The mod gets imported. Hang on until the game finishes loading the content.
Turn on Experimental features and the mod in world settings

When you create a new world, scroll down in the world settings and switch on "Experimental gameplay" — most mods need it. Under "Behavior packs" or "Resource packs" find the mod you just set up and tap "Activate".
Hop into the world
Create the world and start playing — the mod is now active and ready to go.
